;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; Spaces are also represented as grounded symbols in the program.
;;; Importing another script into a separate space
;;; TODO: replace symbol by string
  !(import! &kb c2_spaces_kb)

[P;HTML|
;                                           (load_answer_file  /home/runner/work/metta-wam/metta-wam/tests/baseline_compat/module-system/c2_spaces_kb.metta.answers /home/runner/work/metta-wam/metta-wam/tests/baseline_compat/module-system/c2_spaces_kb.metta)
P;HTML|

  (Green is-a Color)
  (White is-a Color)
  (Blue is-a Color)
  (Red is-a Color)
  (Brown is-a Color)
  (Yellow is-a Color)
  (Earth is-a Planet)
  (Mars is-a Planet)
  (Venus is-a Planet)
  (Mars is Red)
  (Blood is Red)
  (Venus orbit 0.7 au)
  (Earth orbit 1 au)
  (Mars orbit 1.5 au)

Deterministic: ()
()]
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; We can `match` over `&self` or another space
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &kb 
      (, 
        ($obj is $prop) 
        ($prop is-a Color) 
        ($obj is-a Planet)) 
      (Color of Planet $obj is $prop)) 
    ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red)))

[

;
;; MODULE-SYSTEM.C2-SPACES.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.000651 secs. (651.15 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &kb 
      (, 
        ($obj is $prop) 
        ($prop is-a Color) 
        ($obj is-a Planet)) 
      (Color of Planet $obj is $prop)) 
    ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red)) 
      ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6328))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (match &kb 
            (, 
              ($_4020 is $_4044) 
              ($_4044 is-a Color) 
              ($_4020 is-a Planet)) 
            (Color of Planet $_4020 is $_4044)) 
          ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red))) $_3662) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4330) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3662 $_4358) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3310) $_4358)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6328))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (match &kb 
            (, 
              ($_4020 is $_4044) 
              ($_4044 is-a Color) 
              ($_4020 is-a Planet)) 
            (Color of Planet $_4020 is $_4044)) 
          ( (Color of Planet Mars is Red))) $_3662) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4330) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3662 $_4358) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3310) $_4358)))))

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (match &kb 
      (, 
        ($obj is $prop) 
        ($prop is-a Color) 
        ($obj is-a Planet))
